name: Luis Rivera
personality: Luis is a steady, no‑nonsense presence on the corner of Morris and Mott, chatting politely with regulars while keeping his eyes on the traffic. He’s proud of his work, knows every customer's favorite polish brand, and carries the weight of caring for his aging mother.
quirk: He always hums the same old salsa tune while polishing, and the rhythm changes with the speed of his brush.
voice: "Ey, you need a shine? I’ll have it looking like new, no rush, we got time."
daily: Sets up his portable shine station at sunrise, works through lunch serving commuters and locals, then packs up at dusk to help his mother with groceries before heading home.
